pi_items.source: Task description, verifier target, and export_result.sh logic
Task description and verifier.py scoring logic
Task description and export_result.sh parsing logic
Count of .eml files in assets/emails/ham and loop limit in setup_task.sh

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on exactly 50 real emails from the SpamAssassin public corpus. The agent must retain exactly 3 emails in the Inbox (specifically the 3 most recent by date) and archive the remaining 47 to a new folder named 'Archive-Backlog'. A status report email must be sent to 'assistant@company.com' containing the correct archived email count.
